mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ad_accounts ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT DISTINCT LOWER(TRIM(media)) AS platform FROM ad_accounts WHERE media IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(media) != '' ORDER BY platform
SELECT DISTINCT UPPER(TRIM(country)) AS country FROM ad_accounts WHERE country IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(country) != '' ORDER BY country
SELECT DISTINCT subject_name FROM ad_accounts WHERE subject_name IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(subject_name) != '' ORDER BY subject_name
SELECT * FROM ad_accounts WHERE account_id = #{accountId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ad_accounts ( media, country, subject_name, account_id, account_name, media_alias, account_agent, created_by, created_by_name, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{media}, #{country}, #{subjectName}, #{accountId}, #{accountName}, #{mediaAlias}, #{accountAgent}, #{createdBy}, #{createdByName}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE ad_accounts SET media = #{media}, country = #{country}, subject_name = #{subjectName}, account_id = #{accountId}, account_name = #{accountName}, media_alias = #{mediaAlias}, account_agent = #{accountAgent}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM ad_accounts WHERE id IN
#{id}
